zh.lifeSummary: Juliana Dodington是Sir John Doddington和Elizabeth Hughes的女兒，於1477年出生在英國奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼。她於1499年2月14日與John Prince在英國英格蘭奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1510年在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Juliana Dodington是Sir John Doddington和Elizabeth Hughes的女儿，于1477年出生在英国奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼。她于1499年2月14日与John Prince在英国英格兰奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1510年在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dodington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Doddington
meanings: English: locative name from any of several places called Doddington (Cambs, Kent, Lincs, Cheshire, Northumb) or Dodington (Gloucs, Somerset, Shrops), or from Dry Doddington (Lincs), Great Doddington (Northants). In addition, Dunton (Bucks), Denton (Northants), Derrington (Staffs), and Detton Hall (Shrops) all appear in Domesday Book as Dodintone, and may have contributed to the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: Juliana Dodington was born in 1477, in Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England as the daughter of Sir John Doddington and Elizabeth Hughes. She married John Prince on 14 February 1499, in Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1510, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Juliana Dodington est née en 1477, à Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, fille de Sir John Doddington et Elizabeth Hughes. Elle a épousé John Prince le 14 février 1499, à Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Dodingtonは1477年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヌネハム コウルテナイでSir John DoddingtonとElizabeth Hughesの娘として生まれた。1499年2月14日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヌネハム コウルテナイでJohn Princeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Dodington(은)는 1477년 영국 스퍼드실르 누니함 쿠르텐아이에서 Sir John Doddington(와)과 Elizabeth Hughes의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1499년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 누니함 쿠르텐아이에서 John Prince(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Juliana Dodington родилась в 1477 г. в местности нунэам коуртенеи, оксфордшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir John Doddington и Elizabeth Hughes. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Prince 14 февраля 1499 г. в местности нунэам коуртенеи, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.
